Our Story

About Our School

2049Est. BS
"Where every child's potential is discovered, nurtured and celebrated."

Established in 2049 BS, Shree Surya Primary School has been a beacon of quality primary education in Letang-5, Kherwa, Morang. As a government-affiliated institution, we deliver education that is both accessible and excellent for every family.

Our vision embraces computer immersion with scientific knowledge — preparing young minds for a modern world while grounding them in strong Nepali values, ethics, and community spirit.

Principal
Raju Gautam

Leadership

Our Principal

Principal
School Leadership
Raju Gautam
Principal · Shree Surya Primary School

"At Shree Surya Primary School, we believe that every child holds unlimited potential. Our mission is to nurture that potential in a safe, joyful, and pressure-free environment — where curiosity is celebrated, learning is meaningful, and every student is empowered to shine."

What We Offer

Our Facilities

💻

Computer Lab

Modern digital learning where students explore technology from an early age, building 21st-century skills for a connected world.

⚽

Sports Training

Dedicated sports program promoting physical fitness, teamwork, and healthy competition among all students.

🚿

Hygienic Facilities

Clean, well-maintained washrooms ensuring a healthy and comfortable environment for every student every day.

📚

Bilingual Education

Both Nepali and English taught with equal dedication — giving students a strong bilingual foundation for national and global opportunities.

💰

Affordable Fees

Quality education at affordable fees — ensuring no child in our community misses out due to financial barriers.

🌿

Peaceful Campus

A calm, green and welcoming campus that fosters deep concentration, creativity, and emotional wellbeing in every child.

Discipline & Values

School Rules & Regulations

01

Proper hygiene and respectful manners toward teachers, peers, and all school members at all times.

02

Zero tolerance for bullying, hate speech, or any form of discrimination. We lift each other up.

03

Proper school uniform and strict punctuality — students must arrive on time and be properly dressed.

04

Sharing knowledge and supporting one another — academic collaboration and peer support are highly encouraged.

05

No littering on school premises — students are responsible for maintaining the cleanliness of their school.

06

All homework and classwork must be completed sincerely and submitted on time, without exception.

07

Maintain silence and discipline inside classrooms and throughout all areas of the school campus.

08

Respect school property, equipment, and facilities. Any damage must be reported to a teacher immediately.

09

Show ethical conduct both inside and outside school — representing Shree Surya with pride and honor.

10

Regular attendance is mandatory. Parents must notify the school in advance for any planned absence.

New Year 2082 · Admission Open
Join Our Family

Admission Information

Who Can Apply

  • Any student from Nursery/Playgroup up to Class 5
  • Children of all backgrounds and abilities are welcome
  • Free admission available for Playgroup (Nursery)
  • Mid-term admissions considered on a case-by-case basis
  • Class starts from 3rd of Baishak (New Academic Year)
  • Consult directly with Principal Raju Gautam for details
🎓

Ready to Enroll?

Admission is open for all classes from Nursery to Class 5. Every child deserves quality, joyful education. Call our principal today to learn about placement and fees.
